final_text:
Based on my research, the Finance Pack v2 (approved 15 April 2026) reports the qualified pipeline at EUR 8.400 million for Q1 2026 actual — matching the claim. The Regional Performance document shows 8.100, but explicitly states its pipeline "uses local CRM qualification and is not ranked against Finance," so the two figures have a stated scope difference and do not compete.
